body.docName: 根据发票压缩包下载文件
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/downloadHisInvoice 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/downloadHisInvoice 
 ## 接口描述 
根据发票压缩包下载文件，通过参数可以控制下载发票文件或者下载发票及附件。该接口需要和接口v1/invoice/batchInvoiceExport配合使用 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: GET  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","required":true,"exampleValue":"XFT00001"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AEid","desc":"%20%E4%BB%8E%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E4%B8%AD%E8%8E%B7%E5%8F%96","required":true,"exampleValue":"2022000000000000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileName","maxLength":"500","label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","desc":"%20%E4%BB%8E%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E4%B8%AD%E8%8E%B7%E5%8F%96","required":true,"exampleValue":"1121"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"option","maxLength":"1","label":"%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4","desc":"%201-%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%80%BC%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%85%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%EF%BC%9B2-%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%92%8C%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%09%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E4%B8%8E%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%97%B6%E7%9A%84option%E7%9B%B8%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94","required":false,"exampleValue":"1"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
`{BaseURL}/api/v1/invoice/downloadHisInvoice?OPAUID=XFT00001&billId=2022000000000000&fileName=1121`


###返回示例
文件流  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|-----------|-------------------|-------------------------------|
| 200      | 成功                 | 无                            |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/invoice/downloadHisInvoice

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/invoice/downloadHisInvoice

接口描述

根据发票压缩包下载文件，通过参数可以控制下载发票文件或者下载发票及附件。该接口需要和接口v1/invoice/batchInvoiceExport配合使用

调用方式

METHOD: GET

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","required":true,"exampleValue":"XFT00001"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","maxLength":"20","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AEid","desc":"%20%E4%BB%8E%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E4%B8%AD%E8%8E%B7%E5%8F%96","required":true,"exampleValue":"2022000000000000"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileName","maxLength":"500","label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","desc":"%20%E4%BB%8E%E5%9B%9E%E8%B0%83%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E4%B8%AD%E8%8E%B7%E5%8F%96","required":true,"exampleValue":"1121"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"option","maxLength":"1","label":"%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4","desc":"%201-%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%80%BC%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%85%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%EF%BC%9B2-%E4%B8%8B%E8%BD%BD%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%92%8C%E9%99%84%E4%BB%B6%09%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E4%B8%8E%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%97%B6%E7%9A%84option%E7%9B%B8%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94","required":false,"exampleValue":"1"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"}}]}

接口调用示例

###请求示例 {BaseURL}/api/v1/invoice/downloadHisInvoice?OPAUID=XFT00001&billId=2022000000000000&fileName=1121

###返回示例 文件流

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
200 成功 无
